platforms.invocation: Mention signal-core or ask the agent to use the SignalCore skill.
platforms.notes: Portable default for hosts that discover the Agent Skills standard.

platforms.invocation: Use $signal-core.
Mention signal-core or invoke the installed skill/plugin.
platforms.notes: Native skill path and Claude Code marketplace metadata are included.

platforms.invocation: Ask Gemini to activate the signal-core skill.
Mention or select the signal-core skill.
platforms.notes: Antigravity IDE workspace/global Agent Skill locations.

platforms.invocation: Use /skills or ask Antigravity CLI to activate signal-core.
Use @signal-core or let Cascade activate it.
platforms.notes: Native Cascade skill; Windsurf also reads .agents/skills.

platforms.invocation: Ask OpenCode to load signal-core through its skill tool.
Mention the signal-core skill in Copilot Chat.
Use @signal-core or reference the SignalCore project rule.
platforms.notes: Cursor currently uses Project Rules/AGENTS.md rather than native Agent Skills.

platforms.invocation: Enable the SignalCore rule in Cline's Rules panel.
Enable the SignalCore rule in Agent/Chat mode.
Ask Junie to follow the SignalCore section in AGENTS.md.
platforms.notes: Junie reads AGENTS.md; older versions may also use .junie/guidelines.md.

platforms.invocation: Select Codex/Claude/ACP agent and follow the SignalCore AGENTS.md block.
platforms.notes: Works through agent instructions; native skills depend on the selected integrated agent.

platforms.invocation: Ask the agent to follow the SignalCore block in AGENTS.md.
platforms.notes: Fallback for agents that read AGENTS.md, including many IDE and CLI agents.

platforms.invocation: Reference AGENTS.md and run the SignalCore scripts when needed.
platforms.notes: Best-effort bridge; no native SignalCore skill discovery is claimed.

platforms.invocation: Add AGENTS.md as a read-only convention file or paste the compact adapter prompt.
Attach AGENTS.md or the compact SignalCore adapter prompt.

Attach AGENTS.md or run SignalCore's Python CLI before the coding task.
